description_long: This kiosk is a compact, multi-tiered produce stand featuring several shelves stacked with a variety of fruits and vegetables. The front is densely packed with crates and baskets containing items such as apples, melons, grapes, and cherries, all organized in a visually appealing manner. The structure appears to be made primarily of wood and plastic, with some cardboard boxes and netted bags visible among the produce. The sides reveal the depth of the shelving and the layered arrangement of goods, with some items protruding slightly for easy access. The base is solid and boxy, providing stability, while the topmost shelf is filled with smaller, bagged items. There is no visible signage, window, or door, and the overall design is utilitarian, focused on maximizing display space for fresh goods.
description: A compact, multi-shelf produce kiosk densely packed with crates and baskets of assorted fruits and vegetables. The structure is utilitarian, with wood and plastic materials and a focus on maximizing display space.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full array of produce, with multiple shelves and crates tightly packed and clearly visible.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the shelving and the stacked arrangement of boxes and baskets.
description_view_2: The direct front view provides the clearest look at the variety and organization of fruits and vegetables on display.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the angled shelves and the layered produce, with some items protruding for accessibility.
attribute_roof_design: flat, constructed from wood or similar material, no overhang or decorative features
